steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content:
The function is written in vertex form.
$$
f(x)=\frac{1}{8}(x-3)^2+6
$$
A function in the form $a(x-h)^2+k$ has vertex $(h,k)$, so the vertex is $(3,6)$.

steps.title: Interpret the height
steps.content: The coefficient of the squared term is positive, so the vertex is the minimum point. In this context, the $y$-value gives the drone's minimum height: $6$ inches above the ground. The answer is A.
